description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2.7 Docker image and caching the vendor/ directory. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs pip install hyde then hyde gen, and is excluded from the master branch. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs pip install hyde then hyde gen -d public, publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Ensure the cache is applied to both jobs.
